programme.title: BKFC 18: Beltran vs. Shewmaker
programme.desc: BKFC title bouts featuring Joey Beltran vs. Sam Shewmaker, Hector Lombard vs. Joe Riggs, Luis Palomino vs. Tyler Goodjohn, and Thiago Alves vs. Ulysses Diaz in bare knuckle boxing action from Miami, Florida. From June 26, 2021.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Joe Tehan, Brian Okin, Straton Wilhelm, Andy Loomis, Julian Parmann, Justin Young and Markus Gonsalves are playing $100/$100 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.desc: Joe Tehan, Brian Okin, Straton Wilhelm, Andy Loomis, Julian Parmann, Justin Young and Markus Gonsalves are playing $100/$100 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future

programme.title: PFL Vault
programme.desc: MMA fighters don't get paid by the hour and PFL fighters earn points for Fast Finishes like these.

programme.title: PFL Vault
programme.desc: Everyone has a game plan... until they get punched in the face. These heavy hitters throw heavy leather looking to get the KO finish.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Cris Cyborg takes on Leslie Smith in the main event from Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn. Cyborg and Smith first fought in the UFC in 2016. From May 21, 2021.

programme.title: BKFC 36
programme.desc: From Feb. 24, 2023. Features Alan Belcher vs. Arnold Adams for BKFC heavyweight championship, plus James Lilley vs. Bobby Taylor in bare-knuckle boxing action from Kenner, La.

programme.title: BKFC 52
programme.desc: From Colonial Life Arena, Columbia, SC.

programme.title: Hitman Fight League
programme.desc: From Indigo at the O2 in London.

programme.title: PFL Vault: Elbows
programme.desc: Back when elbows were allowed, WSOF fighters made ample use of such a tool, and delivered some thrilling TKOs.

programme.title: PFL Vault
programme.desc: Tap, Nap or Snap; the best submissions in the PFL and WSOF featuring Marlon Moraes, Magomed Magomedkerimov and Natan Schulte.

programme.desc: Cris Cyborg takes on Leslie Smith in the main event from Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn. Cyborg and Smith first fought in the UFC in 2016. From May 21, 2021.

programme.desc: A featherweight clash between Dat Nguyen and Daniel Straus. From Delray Beach Tennis Center in Delray Beach, Fla.

programme.desc: Leonardo Perdomo vs. Arnold Adams, heavyweight; Gee Perez vs. Andrew Strode, flyweight championship bout. From Hard Rock Live in Hollywood, Fla.

programme.desc: First round knockouts from Rumble Johnson. Justin Gaethje, Emiliano Sordi and more.

programme.title: PFL Vault

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jason head to Nevada to explore the trails and mountains around the beautiful Lake Tahoe.
